goal: EXTEND existing 912-LOC prior art (resignation-page.tsx + use-resignation.ts + humi-profile-slice.ts) ให้ ESS termination request flow persist ผ่าน humi-profile-slice PendingChange (sectionKey='termination') + แสดง 4 voluntary reason codes + link จาก /profile/me Employment tab.

existingPatterns: Zustand persist v2 + migrate() — bump version + add no-op branch when extending enums
ReasonPicker primitive (event prop filter) — extend with mode='ess-voluntary' instead of duplicating component
AttachmentDropzone for attachment fields (universal pattern from #50)
Thai-primary labels (C10) — locale codes (TH)/(EN)/(VN) only allowed in parens
design tokens (text-ink, bg-surface, border-hairline) — no Tailwind raw colors

constraints: Builder write ≤ 150 LOC (EXTEND not BUILD per Phase 0.6)
Touch only 5 files: humi-profile-slice.ts / ReasonPicker.tsx / use-resignation.ts / resignation-page.tsx / profile/me/page.tsx
DO NOT TOUCH: /admin/employees/[id]/terminate (#18 shipped) / SPD approval / payroll cron / e-signing
DO NOT INVENT new state mechanism — humi-profile-slice = SSoT (C7)
Thai-primary labels mandatory (C10); reject SF-bilingual paren patterns
useResignation MUST NOT contain useState<ResignationRecord> (read from store only)

acceptanceCriteria.text: /resignation submission persists ผ่าน useHumiProfileStore.submitChangeRequest({sectionKey:'termination', ...}) — pendingChanges array ได้ entry ใหม่ที่ sectionKey === 'termination'
useResignation hook อ่านจาก useHumiProfileStore.pendingChanges ไม่ใช่ local useState — git grep useState.*ResignationRecord returns 0
ReasonPicker mode='ess-voluntary' แสดงเฉพาะ 4 codes (RESIGN_PERSONAL, RESIGN_STUDY, RESIGN_FAMILY, RESIGN_OTHER) — RTL counts dropdown options === 4
หลัง submit สำเร็จ → ResignationPage status timeline แสดง state 'submitted' step active
/profile/me Employment tab มี link ไปยัง /${locale}/resignation — RTL getByRole('link') matches href + visible Thai label
acceptanceCriteria.rule: Ken U1 keep separate + link from profile

acceptanceCriteria.text: All unit tests green + npm run build exits 0 + Phase 4.5 Validator Triad APPROVE — captured terminal output
acceptanceCriteria.rule: C2 test evidence + interview Q4 item 6

ontologySchema.name: ESS Termination Request
ontologySchema.description: Employee-initiated voluntary resignation request stored as PendingChange in humi-profile-slice

fields.name: lastWorkingDate
fields.description: ISO-8601 date — วันสุดท้ายที่ทำงาน (employee-entered)

fields.name: reasonCode
fields.description: Voluntary subset enum: RESIGN_PERSONAL | RESIGN_STUDY | RESIGN_FAMILY | RESIGN_OTHER (employee picks from ReasonPicker mode='ess-voluntary')

fields.name: handoverNotes
fields.description: Free text — รายละเอียดการส่งมอบงาน (employee-entered, optional)

fields.name: sectionKey
fields.description: Discriminator literal 'termination' — set by store action, not user

fields.name: requestedAt
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp set by submitChangeRequest action

fields.name: status
fields.description: PendingChange status — initial 'pending' (system-set); transitions to 'approved'/'rejected' by admin (out-of-scope)

fields.name: noticePeriod
fields.description: Derived from lastWorkingDate − today (out-of-scope to compute strictly; Sprint 2 backend)

fields.name: employeeId
fields.description: Lookup จาก current authed user (FE-only mock = 'EMP000' / 'Current User')

evaluationPrinciples.name: simplicity
evaluationPrinciples.description: Rule C3 — ≤ 150 LOC, no new state mechanism

evaluationPrinciples.name: ssot
evaluationPrinciples.description: Rule C7 — humi-profile-slice = single source for termination state

evaluationPrinciples.name: thai_primary
evaluationPrinciples.description: Rule C10 — labels Thai-only, no SF-bilingual parens

evaluationPrinciples.name: surgical
evaluationPrinciples.description: Rule C1 — touch only 5 files, every change traces to AC

exitConditions.name: all_ac_pass
exitConditions.description: Every AC passes G3 checklist with terminal evidence

exitConditions.name: c10_clean
exitConditions.description: C10 grep gate returns 0 SF-bilingual matches in touched files

exitConditions.name: loc_budget
exitConditions.description: Builder write ≤ 150 LOC across 5 touched files (EXTEND not rewrite)

outOfScope: Backend resignation API (FE-only SSoT for MVP)
17-canonical reason code parity for ESS (Ken U2: voluntary subset only)
Fold ResignationPage into /profile/me tab (Ken U1: keep separate)

systemInvariants: Voluntary reasons only — ReasonPicker mode='ess-voluntary' MUST filter EVENT_REASONS['5597'] to exactly 4 RESIGN_* codes; employee cannot self-classify involuntary termination (TERM_DISMISS, TERM_LAYOFF, etc.)
humi-profile-slice = single source of truth for ESS termination state; useResignation MUST subscribe to store, never duplicate state via local useState
Thai-primary labels mandatory (C10) — all 4 RESIGN_* labels + UI copy in Thai; no SF-bilingual parens beyond locale codes (TH)/(EN)/(VN)
PendingChange.sectionKey === 'termination' is the ONLY discriminator for ESS termination requests; store action MUST set this literal, callers MUST NOT pass any other value
Persist version bump (v2 → v3) MUST include migrate() v2→v3 branch (no-op acceptable since pendingChanges schema unchanged, only enum extended); existing v2 localStorage state MUST survive load
Existing /admin/employees/[id]/terminate (HR Admin path) MUST remain untouched — ReasonPicker default mode='admin' preserves 17-code behavior for that caller

triad_review.reason: EXTEND scope post-Phase-0.6 validated; prior art (912 LOC) rich; Ken decisions U1+U2 explicit; saving budget for Phase 4.5 first-fire

validator.source: MK IV dual-role outcomes.json — 6/6 AC PASS

counter_validator.evidence_quality_summary: 4 SUFFICIENT + 2 SHALLOW (AC-4 positional, AC-5 locale parametrization)

devils_advocate.summary: EC-08 auth-guard HIGH (out-of-scope — Sprint 2 P-B1); EC-02 handoverNotes drop MEDIUM; EC-01 concurrent submit MEDIUM; EC-03/04 status mapping bugs; EC-11 pre-existing admin labels
